title: Write a Compelling Product Description
scenario: Craft a product description for a new smart home security camera that fits within a 250-word limit, highlights its key features, and appeals to customers who value convenience and peace of mind.
constraints: Must emphasize convenience and peace of mind
Must highlight the camera's key features

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the product description meets the word limit.
Evaluate the tone of the description to ensure it is friendly, informative, and persuasive.
Assess if the description accurately and effectively showcases the camera's key features.
